title: Return zero or positive classification
prompt_goal: Implement a pure action that accepts an integer input named count. The count is guaranteed to be zero or positive. Return the literal text label zero when count equals zero; otherwise return the literal text label positive.
public_forbidden: Do not use storage, network, time, randomness, filesystem, or external services.
Do not hardcode verifier cases or special-case concrete input values.
Do not print or emit observable effects.
